tests.title: Password login survives relaunch
tests.description: Logs in with the embedded password flow, relaunches the app without resetting state, and verifies the authenticated session is restored.

tests.title: Embedded SAML login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded SAML flow, completes the mock Okta SAML handoff, and verifies the SAML user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded OIDC login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded OIDC flow, completes the mock Okta OIDC handoff, and verifies the OIDC user is signed in.

tests.title: Request authorize flow signs in seeded user
tests.description: Seeds the request-authorize token, starts the authorize flow, and verifies the seeded signup user is authenticated.

tests.title: Custom SSO browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the custom SSO browser flow, completes the mock IdP handoff, and verifies the custom SSO user is signed in.

tests.title: Direct social browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the direct social browser flow, completes the mock social provider handoff, and verifies the social user is signed in.

tests.title: Cold launch probe timeouts do not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Queues transient startup probe timeouts and verifies the app stays on the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Post-logout relaunch transient probe failure does not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Logs out, queues transient startup probe failures, relaunches, and verifies the app returns to the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Authenticated relaunch enters offline mode when the network path is unavailable
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches with the network path forced offline, and verifies the existing session stays available with authenticated offline indicators and no retry UI.

tests.title: Expired access token refreshes on authenticated relaunch
tests.description: Configures a short-lived access token, relaunches after expiry, and verifies the token refreshes successfully without entering offline mode.

tests.title: Offline mode recovers to online and refreshes the token
tests.description: Forces a refresh failure plus probe failures near expiry, verifies authenticated offline mode is entered, then verifies recovery back online with a refreshed token.

tests.title: Offline mode keeps the user signed in until reconnect refreshes an expired token
tests.description: Forces a prolonged offline window, lets the access token expire while offline, verifies the user stays signed in, and verifies reconnect refreshes the token successfully.

tests.title: Custom SSO recovers after a transient no-connection relaunch
tests.description: Logs out, relaunches through a transient no-connection state if it appears, then completes custom SSO and verifies the user is signed in again.

tests.title: Cold launch with offline mode disabled reaches login quickly
tests.description: Queues probe failures, launches with enableOfflineMode=false, and verifies the app reaches the login screen quickly without showing offline or no-connection UI.

tests.title: Offline mode disabled preserves session during connection loss and recovers
tests.description: Logs in with enableOfflineMode=false, terminates, queues connection drops, relaunches, verifies the session is preserved without offline indicators, then verifies the profile is restored when connection returns.

tests.title: Password login works with offline mode disabled
tests.description: Launches with enableOfflineMode=false and completes a password login, confirming normal auth flows are unaffected.

tests.title: Logout clears session so relaunch shows login
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, terminates, relaunches without reset, and verifies the login page appears (keychain cleared by logout).

tests.title: Expired refresh token clears session and shows login
tests.description: Logs in with a very short refresh token TTL, waits for both tokens to expire, relaunches, and verifies the app clears credentials and shows login.

tests.title: Scheduled token refresh fires before expiry
tests.description: Logs in with a short access token TTL and verifies the SDK's scheduled refresh fires automatically, incrementing the token version while the app stays in the foreground.

tests.title: Relaunch with expired access token refreshes via valid refresh token
tests.description: Logs in with a very short access TTL, terminates after access expires but before refresh expires, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed.

tests.title: Password login with medium complexity requirement
tests.description: Configures medium password complexity, logs in with a valid medium-complexity password, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Password login with hard complexity requirement
tests.description: Configures hard password complexity, logs in with a valid hard-complexity password, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with MFA authenticator app
tests.description: Logs in with password, verifies MFA authenticator page appears, enters TOTP code, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with MFA SMS
tests.description: Logs in with password, verifies MFA SMS page appears, enters SMS code, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with magic code
tests.description: Configures magic code login, enters 6-digit code, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with magic code + MFA authenticator
tests.description: Logs in with magic code, completes MFA authenticator step, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Login with magic code + MFA SMS
tests.description: Logs in with magic code, completes MFA SMS step, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Login with magic link redirect
tests.description: Configures magic link login, waits for auto-redirect, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with magic link + MFA authenticator
tests.description: Logs in with magic link, completes MFA authenticator step, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Login with magic link + MFA SMS
tests.description: Logs in with magic link, completes MFA SMS step, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Login with SMS
tests.description: Enters phone number, receives SMS code, enters code, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Login with username
tests.description: Enters username and password, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Sign up with SMS
tests.description: Fills signup form with phone number, and verifies account creation succeeds.

tests.title: Sign up with username
tests.description: Fills signup form with username, and verifies account creation succeeds.

tests.title: Sign up with social login
tests.description: Initiates social login signup flow via mock Google IdP and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Sign up with email verification redirect (password)
tests.description: Signs up, verifies email verification page appears, auto-redirects, and verifies authentication with password.

tests.title: Sign up with email verification redirect (passwordless)
tests.description: Signs up with passwordless config, verifies email verification page appears, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Sign up with accepted terms of use
tests.description: Fills signup form, checks TOS checkbox, submits, and verifies account creation succeeds.

tests.title: Sign up with unchecked terms of use shows error
tests.description: Fills signup form without checking TOS checkbox, submits, and verifies error message appears.

tests.title: Sign up TOS error on set password page after email verification
tests.description: Signs up with email verification + TOS required, does not check TOS, and verifies error on submit.

tests.title: Forget password with easy complexity
tests.description: Navigates to forgot password, resets with an easy-complexity password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Forget password with medium complexity
tests.description: Navigates to forgot password, resets with a medium-complexity password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Forget password with hard complexity
tests.description: Navigates to forgot password, resets with a hard-complexity password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Forget password with email
tests.description: Submits email for password reset, enters new password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Forget password with SMS
tests.description: Submits phone number for password reset, enters new password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Account locked after incorrect password attempts
tests.description: Configures account locking, attempts login, and verifies 'account locked' error message.

tests.title: Breached password warning
tests.description: Configures a breached password, attempts login, and verifies warning message.

tests.title: Password expiration with remind later
tests.description: Logs in with expiring password, verifies expiration page, clicks remind later, and reaches authenticated page.

tests.title: Password expiration with change password
tests.description: Logs in with expiring password, clicks change password, sets new password, and verifies success.

tests.title: Password expired page has no remind later button
tests.description: Logs in with expired password, verifies expired page appears and remind later button is absent.

tests.title: Password expired change password
tests.description: Logs in with expired password, changes password on expired page, and verifies success.

tests.title: Magic code incorrect code shows error
tests.description: Enters wrong magic code and verifies 'Invalid code' error message.

tests.title: Magic code expiration shows error
tests.description: Waits for magic code to expire, enters code, and verifies 'Code expired' error message.

tests.title: Magic link expiration shows error
tests.description: Configures short magic link TTL, waits for expiration, and verifies 'Link expired' error message.

tests.title: Resend code button issues new code
tests.description: Waits for code to expire, clicks resend, enters fresh code, and verifies authentication succeeds.

tests.title: Confirm magic link redirect
tests.description: Starts magic link flow, auto-redirects, and verifies user is authenticated.

tests.title: User activation confirmation
tests.description: Navigates to activation page, clicks confirm, and verifies user is authenticated.

tests.title: New account invitation confirmation
tests.description: Navigates to invitation page, accepts invitation, and verifies user is authenticated.

tests.title: Unlock account confirmation
tests.description: Navigates to unlock page, confirms unlock, and verifies user is authenticated.

tests.title: Custom login box password login
tests.description: Enables custom login box, logs in with password, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Custom login box magic code login
tests.description: Enables custom login box with magic code, enters code, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Custom login box social login
tests.description: Enables custom login box, uses social login, and verifies authentication.
